mapper.select:
SELECT h.id, h.base_id AS baseId, h.plot_id AS plotId, p.plot_code AS plotCode, p.plot_name AS plotName, h.area, h.predict_yield AS predictYield, h.total_yield AS totalYield, h.machine_name AS machineName, h.harvest_date AS harvestDate, h.operator, h.work_duration AS workDuration, h.remark, h.create_by AS createBy, h.create_time AS createTime, h.update_by AS updateBy, h.update_time AS updateTime FROM youcai_harvest h LEFT JOIN youcai_plots p ON h.plot_id = p.id WHERE h.del_flag = 0
AND h.base_id = #{harvest.baseId}
AND h.plot_id = #{harvest.plotId}
AND h.machine_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{harvest.machineName}, '%')
AND p.plot_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{plotName}, '%')
AND DATE(h.harvest_date) = DATE(#{harvest.harvestDate})
ORDER BY h.create_time DESC
